'''RR'uruurrr''' was a hunter of the [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Sand People]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. [[Gender/Legends|He]] was a member of [[URoRRuR'R'R]]'s hunting party that captured [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] in the [[Jundland Wastes/Legends|Jundland Wastes]]. While in the village, he tended the [[Bantha/Legends|banthas]].
